ALCHEMIST-ALKAHEST.description: If used in combat, [gold]Infuse[/gold] up to [blue]3[/blue] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Otherwise, upgrade a card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].

ALCHEMIST-GOLD_LEAF.description: Heal [green]1[/green] HP and gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] for every [blue]15[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] you have.{HealTotal}
ALCHEMIST-GOLD_LEAF.title: Gold Leaf
